Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWENTRADAPRODUCAO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &PrdSts = nullvalue(&PrdSts) Form.Caption = 'Entrada da Produção' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PrdDtaEnt_To.IsEmpty() &PrdDtaEnt_To = serverdate() &PrdDtaEnt = serverdate() - 30 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PrdSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NewUpdate = !'' &acoesEntrada.Clear() &acoesEntrada.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (PrdSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &acoesEntrada.AddItem(1, 'Fechar Produção') Endif If (PrdSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO) &acoesEntrada.AddItem(2, 'Abrir Produção') Endif If (PrdSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &acoesEntrada.AddItem(3, 'Cancelar Entrada') Endif &acoesEntrada.AddItem(4, 'Críticas da Produção') &ImprimirEntrada = !'' PrdDtaEnt.Link = ViewEntradaProducao.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod, '') Do Case Case PrdSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO PrdSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Case PrdSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO PrdSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnBold WWColumnBoldSingleCell' Case PrdSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO PrdSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise PrdSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If PrdSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO &NewUpdate = !'' &NewUpdate.TooltipText = "GXM_update" &NewUpdate.Link = wpEntradaProducao.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod) Else &NewUpdate = !'' &NewUpdate.TooltipText = "Visualizar" &NewUpdate.Link = ViewEntradaProducao.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod, '') EndIf PrdSaiPedCod.Link = verPedido.Link('WWENTRADAPRODUCAO', EmpCod, FilCod, PrdSaiPedCod) PrdEntPedCod.Link = verPedido.Link('WWENTRADAPRODUCAO', EmpCod, FilCod, PrdEntPedCod) EndEvent Event &acoesEntrada.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &acoesEntrada = 1 Do 'Do FecharProducao' Case &acoesEntrada = 2 Do 'Do AbrirEntrada' Case &acoesEntrada = 3 Do 'Do CancelaEntrada' Case &acoesEntrada = 4 Do 'Do CriticasProducao' EndCase &acoesEntrada = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event CriticasProducao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdEntPedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EntradaProducaoCapa.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(FilCod), nullvalue(PrdCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportarProducao' wpExportarProducao.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do FecharProducao' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('FECHARENTRADAPRODUCAO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) if &AutNiv > 0 VerificaLoteInformadoEntradaProducao.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod, &IsTodosInformados, &mensagem) if &IsTodosInformados = false WpInformaLotesFaltantesEntradaProducao.Link('WWENTRADAPRODUCAO', EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod) Else FechaEntradaProducao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod) Refresh EndIf Else msg('Não autorizado ao nível de fechar a entrada da produção. [FECHARENTRADAPRODUCAO]') EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEntrada' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('ABRIRENTRADAPRODUCAO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) if &AutNiv > 0 AbrirEntradaProducao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod) Refresh Else msg('Não autorizado ao nível de abrir a entrada da produção. [ABRIRENTRADAPRODUCAO]') EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelaEntrada' If PrdSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO CancelaEntradaproducao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdCod) Refresh EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CriticasProducao' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdEntPedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CriticasProducao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRDCOD" &PrdCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRDSTS" &PrdSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRDDTAENT" &PrdDtaEnt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PrdDtaEnt_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRDENTPEDCOD" &PrdEntPedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRDCOD", "", not &PrdCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PrdCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRDSTS", "", not &PrdSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PrdSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRDDTAENT", "", not (&PrdDtaEnt.IsEmpty() AND &PrdDtaEnt_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PrdDtaEnt.ToString().Trim(), &PrdDtaEnt_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRDENTPEDCOD", "", not &PrdEntPedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PrdEntPedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"EntradaProducao" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ImprimirEntrada.Click wpImprimirEntrada.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PrdEntPedCod, PrdCod) EndEvent // //Sub 'Do geraEtiquetaProduto' // // &EtqCod = trim(str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(str(&Context.FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) // PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G','#EtiquetaCompra#',&PesCod,&EmpCod,&EtqCod,&DATAVAZIA,serverNow(),'T') // // wpGeraEtiquetaProduto.Call() // //EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
